principle: When a large navigation list cannot be reduced organize items into logical groups with consistent order and user-familiar labels
explanation: X.ux|hicks_mega_menu: large_nav_list_unavoidable -> organize NOT eliminate; 3_rules: items_in_logical_order + items_in_recognizable_groups + labels_in_user_language; goal: eye_scans_not_reads; card_sorting_reveals_user_mental_model; NO:long_flat_unordered_list NO:designer_language_not_user_language eg: "50_items_flat_list" >> "grouped: Clothing(tops/bottoms/shoes) + Electronics(phones/laptops) + alphabetical_within_groups"

principle: Show only image, name, and price on product listing cards — all other details belong on the product page
explanation: X.ux|hicks_listing_minimal: product_card_info == decision_minimum_only; listing: image + name + price (+ rating_optional); more_info_on_card -> longer_decision_time -> lower_conversion; details_page: full_description + specs + reviews; NO:listing_card_with_specs+description+badges+offers eg: "card: img+name+price+description+ingredients+badges" >> "card: img+name+price only"
